items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior related to AI-generated parameters. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the expected outcome or the functionality of the AI-generated parameters. The linked use cases and prior steps do not offer sufficient data to determine if the scenario behavior is supported or if it leads to a clear failure report, resulting in an inconclusive status.
